    Meng Zhai 翟猛

    Postdoctoral Fellow in RCLAE, AAE 博士后研究员 (PolyU)

    • Focusing on improving yourself is usually the safest way to be happy. 专注于提升自己通常是最安全的快乐方式。
    • Hong Kong 香港
    • The Hong Kong Polytechnic University 香港理工大学
    • Email 邮箱
    • Google Scholar 谷歌学术
    • ORCID ORCID

    📚 Publications📚 论文列表

      • M. Zhai, T. Yang, N. Sun*, and Y. Fang, “Observer-based adaptive fuzzy control of underactuated offshore cranes for cargo stabilization with respect to ship decks,” Mechanism and Machine Theory, vol. 175, Art. no. 104927, Sept. 2022.

      • M. Zhai, N. Sun*, T. Yang, and Y. Fang, “Underactuated mechanical systems with both actuator and actuated/unactuated state constraints: A predictive control-based approach,” IEEE/ASME Transactions on Mechatronics, vol. 28, no. 3, pp. 1359–1371, Jun. 2023.

      • M. Zhai, S. Diao, T. Yang, Q. Wu, Y. Fang, and N. Sun*, “Adaptive fuzzy control for underactuated robot systems with inaccurate actuated states and unavailable unactuated states,” IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, vol. 22, pp. 1566–1578, 2025.

      • M. Zhai, T. Yang, Q. Wu, S. Guo, R. Pang, and N. Sun*, “Extended Kalman filtering-based nonlinear model predictive control for underactuated systems with multiple constraints and obstacle avoidance,” IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics, vol. 55, no. 1, pp. 369–382, Jan. 2025.

      • M. Zhai, T. Yang, M. Li, X. Jiao, Y. Fang, and N. Sun*, “Adaptive neural network unified control for general MIMO underactuated mechatronic systems with disturbances via modified normal forms,” IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, vol. 22, pp. 19377–19391, 2025.

      • 翟猛, 王奕轩, 侯玮杰, 吴庆祥, 孙宁*, “面向航天器未知运动轨迹的欠驱动悬吊系统安全随动控制,” 机器人, 在线发表, doi: 10.13973/j.cnki.robot.250049. [中文核心期刊；EI检索]

      • 谭宝宝, 康亚亭, 蒲鹏飞, 杨万伟, 黄原, 肖定波, 翟猛*, “基于等效输入干扰的悬吊式水平随动系统控制方法设计,” 郑州大学学报（工学版）, 在线发表, doi: 10.13705/j.issn.1671-6833.2026.05.011. [中文核心期刊]

      • Y. Wang†, T. Yang†, M. Zhai, Y. Fang, and N. Sun*, “Ship-mounted cranes hoisting underwater payloads: Transportation control with guaranteed constraints on overshoots and swing,” IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics, vol. 19, no. 10, pp. 9968–9978, Oct. 2023.

      • T. Yang, M. Zhai, Y. Fang, and N. Sun*, “Adaptive fuzzy control of underactuated switched systems with disturbance observation and actuated/unactuated motion constraints,” IEEE Transactions on Fuzzy Systems, vol. 32, no. 3, pp. 1195–1207, Mar. 2024.

      • T. Yang, N. Sun*, M. Zhai, Y. Fang, and Q. Wu, “Data-based dual-loop learning control of underactuated systems with disturbance prediction and input-output constraints,” IEEE Transactions on Artificial Intelligence, vol. 5, no. 7, pp. 3419–3430, Jul. 2024. [EI indexed]

      • T. Yang, N. Sun*, M. Zhai, and Y. Fang, “Unactuated and actuated states simultaneously constrained optimal trajectory planning-based path-following control for underactuated robots,” IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics, vol. 54, no. 9, pp. 5127–5140, Sept. 2024.

      • Y. Wu, Q. Wu*, M. Zhang, S. Guo, M. Zhai, R. Pang, and N. Sun, “A model predictive control method for 7-DoF tower cranes with distributed mass payloads and variable rope lengths,” Mechanical Systems and Signal Processing, vol. 229, Art. no. 112513, Apr. 2025.

      • 段彬, 翟猛*, 马式跃, 汪倩竹, “酱油薄膜热透镜效应焦距测定的实验设计与应用,” 实验室研究与探索, vol. 40, no. 3, pp. 181–185, Mar. 2021. [中文核心期刊]

      • M. Zhai, T. Yang, and N. Sun*, “Oscillations damping control of variable cable length pendulum systems by gain adaptive MPC,” in Proceedings of the 2023 IEEJ International Workshop on Sensing, Actuation, Motion Control, and Optimization (SAMCON 2023), Southeast University, China, Mar. 24–26, 2023.

      • M. Zhai, Y. Gao, T. Yang, M. Li, and N. Sun*, “Trajectory planning for underactuated mechatronic systems with unactuated mechanical energy limits: A power regulation perspective,” in Proceedings of the 2025 International Conference on Mechatronics, Robotics, and Artificial Intelligence (MRAI 2025), Jinan, China, Jun. 19–21, 2025, pp. 113–117. [IEEE; EI indexed] [Best Paper Award]

      • M. Zhai, T. Yang, M. Li, X. Jiao, Y. Fang, and N. Sun*, “Predictive safety filter for constrained uncertain nonlinear mechatronic systems with GP learning,” in Proceedings of the 2026 IEEE 7th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Electromechanical Automation (IEEE-AIEA 2026), Shenzhen, China, Jun. 26–28, 2026, accepted. [Best Paper Award]
